miwi        2008-04-27 19:46:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/pear-URI_Template Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This package contains a parser for URI Templates as defined
  in the URI Template draft that is currently being proposed to
  the IETF.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/URI_Template/
  
  PR:             ports/122533
  Submitted by:   Wen heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1988    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
